mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notification (user_id, from_user_id, type, post_id, comment_id, content, is_read) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fromUserId}, #{type},
IFNULL(#{postId}, 0),
IF(#{type} IN (1,2,5), 0, IFNULL(#{commentId}, 0)), #{content}, #{isRead}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE create_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, -- 重复 → 刷新创建时间 is_read = 0, -- 重复 → 标记为未读（最新提醒） content = VALUES (content); -- 重复 → 同步最新内容
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
